name: Arcus Development Group Inc.
summary: Arcus Development Group Inc. engages in the acquisition and exploration of mineral properties in Canada. The company primarily explores for gold. It holds a 100% interest in the Touleary property; and a 100% interest the Shamrock property with 72 quartz mining claims covering an area of 14 square kilometers located in the White Gold District of Yukon Territory. The company was founded in 2006 and is headquartered in Vancouver, Canada.
